worktree: ci-gate-hardening (branch claude/ci-gate-hardening, off main; gate verified post-merge)

tasks.subject: CI-1: ci-changes.mjs — change classifier + changelog counter
CI-2: ci.yml — change-aware CI Gate workflow
CI-3: auto-merge requires CI Gate == SUCCESS
CI-4: remove redundant check job from build.yml
tasks.verifyCommand: python -c "import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/build.yml')); assert 'check' not in d['jobs']; print('OK')"

tasks.subject: CI-5: RELEASING.md runbook + one-time setup
tasks.verifyCommand: grep -q "CI Gate" RELEASING.md && grep -q "no-changelog" RELEASING.md && echo OK

tasks.subject: CI-6: CI Gate end-to-end verification (USER GATE)
tasks.verifyCommand: (operational, post-merge) gh pr checks <N> shows only relevant jobs; forced-failing PR shows CI Gate failing + merge refused; clean PR mergeable
